title: pilosella aneimena
intro: Pilosella aneimena, also known as Hieracium aneimena, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Pilosella aneimena include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to act as a natural antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, Pilosella aneimena is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
